values: The forge has gone cold because there is nothing left to smelt
We need raw ore and the usual suppliers have not come through
The mine entrance collapsed and we are waiting on a new source
A construction project depends on materials nobody thought to stockpile
The blacksmith says tools are wearing out faster than they can be replaced
An order came in from the capital and we have nothing to fill it with
The old vein ran dry and nobody has found a replacement yet
Repairs to the settlement wall require materials we simply do not have
The miners are on strike and the council needs an alternative source
We are building something important and every piece of raw material counts
The last shipment was stolen on the road. We need to source locally
The alchemist needs crystalline reagents for work that cannot wait
Our reserves were committed to a trade deal that fell through. Now we have neither the goods nor the ore
The weapon stocks are low and the guard captain is making that everyone's problem
What the earth provides, the settlement consumes. Right now the balance is wrong
